skill.summary: On-chain immutable data storage using IQ Labs tech stack (IQDB, hanLock, x402). Use when building Solana-based persistent storage, on-chain databases, tamper-evident records, password-encoded data, or paid file inscription. Triggers on tasks involving on-chain CRUD, Solana PDA storage, rolling hash verification, Hangul encoding, or HTTP 402 payment-gated inscription.

latestVersion.changelog: Removed internal file paths and local references. Public-safe release.
